PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Continued To May-12-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Maseredjian appeared by telephone for Roger Cantrell.

Mr. Maseredjian stated that from the last time the Family tracked Suzie Powell down to the time she dissappeared, that the Family knew that Suzie had no issue, that research was done by an Heir Finder and that his Client could submit a declaration as to the same. The matter was continued to May 12, 2010 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Maseredjian will appear by telephone.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
